segments.text: SpaceX is building the first real gas
station in space. Artemis is way
different than other space missions. The
last time we went to the moon, we stayed
there very briefly, like a short camping
trip. But this time, we're staying for a
week and preparing for a moon colony,
which requires a lot of supplies. So,
they need a big rocket with a lot of
storage. But the problem is that'll
require a lot of fuel. And it's so heavy
that it uses most of that fuel to just
exit the atmosphere. To refuel things
like the ISS, they've used the
equivalent of small disposable fuel
canisters, but this time it's a depot
that stays in orbit and gets fueled up
by several other spacecraft and then
sucked out by a ship headed for the
moon. It's a space gas station. SpaceX
aims to do a full-scale test in space
really soon. to see what happens next.
